issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing only on happy path usage.
The examples rely on Next.js Image component and TypeScript, limiting applicability to other frameworks or plain JavaScript environments.

scenarios.name: fetch-blog-posts-by-tag
scenarios.rationale: Response B uses the required client.getEntries call and maps items to a RichText component, whereas Response A uses a GraphQL query and does not meet the rubric requirements.

scenarios.name: preview-draft-blog-post
scenarios.rationale: A fully meets all rubric requirements; B is incomplete.
